attributes.title: Global sign-in failures after OIDC key rotation
attributes.summary: 75% of sign-ins failing across production regions after an identity key rotation mismatch.

attributes.name: SEV0
attributes.description: Moderate impact on specific features and requires prompt but not immediate attention (e.g. slow response times)

attributes.title: Unauthorized bastion access attempt blocked
attributes.summary: SIEM detected suspicious bastion login from an unknown ASN; IAM SCP blocked privileged actions.

attributes.name: SEV1
attributes.description: Critical system issue actively impacting many customers' ability to use the product (e.g. website outage)

attributes.title: Checkout latency spike during us-east database failover
attributes.summary: p95 checkout latency exceeded 5s for 18% of requests while replicas re-synced after failover.

attributes.name: SEV2
attributes.description: Critical system issue actively impacting many customers' ability to use the product (e.g. website outage)
